subject: Pricing deck follow-up — Zenlytics
body:
Hi,

Thanks for the pricing deck you shared on WhatsApp. Our finance team has a few questions about the annual pro plan and GST invoicing. Could you send a formal quotation on company letterhead?

Best,
Asha Rao
Ops Lead, Zenlytics
+91 98123 45678

subject: Demo on Friday + quote for 25 seats
body:
Hello,

Confirming the Friday 11am demo for the Finlok sales team. As discussed, please share the quote for 25 seats before the call so we can review pricing internally.

Regards,
Vikram Mehta
Head of Sales, Finlok
Mob: +91 98450 12345

subject: Onboarding details for Craftkart
body:
Hi team,

We completed the payment for the starter plan today. Please share the onboarding steps and add my colleague Ramesh to the account as well.

Thanks,
Priya Nair
Founder, Craftkart
Ph: +91 99001 12233

subject: Enquiry: CRM for clinic chain
body:
Hello,

I run partnerships at Medvista Health, a chain of 14 clinics. We're looking for a CRM to manage patient follow-ups and vendor contacts. Could you share pricing and whether you support role-based access?

Warm regards,
Ananya Deshpande

subject: Trial extension request
body:
Hi,

My 14-day trial ends tomorrow but I've only had time to test half the features. Could you extend the trial by a week? I'm evaluating this for a small real-estate brokerage.

Thanks,
Rahul Verma

subject: Demo request for admissions team
body:
Hi,

We're at BrightEdu, an ed-tech startup in Bengaluru. Our admissions team (8 people) needs a better way to track parent enquiries. Can we schedule a demo next week?

Best,
Tanvi Kulkarni

subject: Invoice discrepancy for June
body:
Hello,

The June invoice shows 18 seats but we only have 15 active users at Logifreight. Please issue a corrected invoice so our accounts team can process payment.

Thanks,
Aditya Menon

subject: API access on the growth plan?
body:
Hi team,

Greenkart is considering the growth plan. Does it include API access for syncing orders from our storefront? Also what would the pricing be for 20 users?

Regards,
Ishita Bose

subject: Re: Enquiry: CRM for clinic chain
body:
Hi Ananya,

Thanks for reaching out! Yes, we support role-based access on the growth plan and above. Pricing sheet attached — happy to do a walkthrough for your team.

Best,
Sales Team

subject: Re: Demo on Friday + quote for 25 seats
body:
Thanks for the quote. Numbers look reasonable. Post-demo, if the team signs off, we'd want to start the purchase paperwork next week itself.

Vikram

subject: Re: Demo request for admissions team
body:
Wednesday 10am works for us. Sending the calendar invite. Please include pricing for the education discount you mentioned.

Tanvi

subject: Re: Trial extension request
body:
Thanks for extending the trial! Quick question — is there a mobile app, or is it web only? Most of my brokers are on the field.

Rahul

subject: Re: Enquiry: CRM for clinic chain
body:
Thanks for the pricing sheet. Could we do a demo for our leadership on Tuesday? Also, do you have a DPDP-compliant data processing agreement we can review?

Ananya

subject: Re: API access on the growth plan?
body:
Great, API access works for us. Please send the payment link for 20 users on the growth plan — we'd like to buy this week.

Ishita

subject: Re: Invoice discrepancy for June
body:
Received the corrected invoice, payment initiated via NEFT today. Please confirm once it reflects.

Aditya Menon
Finance, Logifreight
